# apilane — Affordable AI API for Coders

> Affordable AI models, pay per call.
> Tested models at 1/10 to 1/60 of official prices. $2 minimum deposit.
> Crypto accepted (USDT TRC20/BSC). No subscriptions, no hidden fees.

## Overview

apilane is a pay-per-call LLM API gateway for individual developers and small teams. We list only tested models, with flat per-call pricing at 1/10 to 1/60 of official rates. Crypto payment (USDT TRC20/BSC) and a $2 minimum deposit.

## Core Services

- [Pricing](https://apilane.one/en/#pricing) — Per-call prices, fetched live from the public API
- [Features](https://apilane.one/en/#features) - Pay per call, crypto payment, OpenAI-compatible
- [FAQ](https://apilane.one/en/#faq) — How it works, how we keep prices low
- [Console](https://api.apilane.one) - Sign up, get an API key, top up
- [API Endpoint](https://api.apilane.one/v1) — OpenAI-compatible
- [Status](https://status.apilane.one) — Live availability

## Key Differentiators

- $2 minimum deposit - test the API with real calls
- Crypto payment: USDT (TRC20, BSC) via epusdt
- 1/10 to 1/60 of official API prices, depending on the model
- OpenAI-compatible endpoint at https://api.apilane.one/v1 — zero migration cost
- Only tested models are listed; unstable upstreams are swapped out
- No subscription, no lock-in, no platform fee
- Responses passed through unmodified from upstream providers

## Available Models (per-call pricing)

- MiniMax-M2.7 — $0.0005/call
- MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed — $0.0005/call
- MiniMax-M3 — $0.0015/call
- kimi-k2.6 — $0.0025/call
- glm-5.2 — $0.0030/call

Prices are per call. call_price unit is quota; 500,000 quota = $1. Live list at https://api.apilane.one/api/pricing/public.

## Pricing Tiers

- $2 minimum deposit (test the API with real calls)
- $5 / $10 / $20 deposit tiers
- Payment methods: USDT (TRC20, BSC) via epusdt
- No platform fee, no monthly subscription

## API Compatibility

The apilane endpoint at https://api.apilane.one/v1 is OpenAI-compatible. Any code that uses the official `openai` Python or Node.js SDK works with apilane by changing only the `base_url` and API key. Anthropic-format requests are also supported.

## Use Cases

- Personal projects and side experiments
- Bootstrapping and indie hacking
- Cost-sensitive production workloads
- Crypto-native teams that prefer USDT over credit cards
- Developers who want predictable per-call pricing over token math

## Trust and Privacy

- apilane does not store or log your prompt content. Request logs record usage for billing only.
- Responses are passed through unmodified from upstream providers
- Note: apilane is a gateway. Requests are forwarded to upstream model providers; we cannot control whether those providers retain your prompt data.
## Status and Resources

- [Status Page](https://status.apilane.one) — Real-time availability
- [Console](https://api.apilane.one) - Sign up and get an API key

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/apilane
